svg.aria-label: Barista Test: Fiat vs Public Blockchain vs Confidential Token privacy comparison
svg.title: The Barista Test
svg.desc: Three-row comparison showing who sees what when you buy coffee with fiat, public blockchain, and confidential tokens
svg.text: The Barista Test: Who Sees Your Coffee Purchase?
Same $5 coffee, three different payment systems

g.text: All your financial data — visible on-chain forever
Like wearing your bank statement on your forehead

svg.text: Confidential tokens give you fiat-level privacy with stablecoins
